description: Deposition. Location: Minyat Zifta. Dated: Monday, 18 Sivan 1486 Seleucid = 9 June 1175 CE. In which two persons testify to the poverty of a man named Sulaymān b. Ḥasan, who had been condemned to imprisonment for insolvency when his Jewish debtor had brought him before a Muslim court. Signed by five witnesses: Sheʾerit b. Yakhin ha-Kohen; Ṣedaqa b. Hillel ha-Kohen; Berakhot b. Yakhin; Yoshiyya b. David; Nadiv b. David. (Information from Mediterranean Society, I, p. 204)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
